HILLO-TEMPORAL_DOMINION_POWER.title: Temporal Dominion
HILLO-TEMPORAL_DOMINION_POWER.descriptio: At the end of each turn, [gold]Osty[/gold] dies and ALL enemies gain [gold]Doom[/gold] equal to {Amount}x [gold]Osty[/gold]'s Max HP.
HILLO-TEMPORAL_DOMINION_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of each turn, [gold]Osty[/gold] dies and ALL enemies gain [gold]Doom[/gold] equal to {Amount}x [gold]Osty[/gold]'s Max HP.
HILLO-IMPENDING_DOOM_POWER.title: Impending Doom
HILLO-IMPENDING_DOOM_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, kill enemies whose [gold]Doom[/gold] is at least their current HP.
HILLO-IMPENDING_DOOM_POWER.smartDescript: At the end of your turn, kill enemies whose [gold]Doom[/gold] is at least their current HP.
HILLO-UMBRAL_INCURSION_POWER.title: Umbral Incursion
HILLO-UMBRAL_INCURSION_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Orb Slot[/gold] and [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Dark[/gold] Orb.
HILLO-UMBRAL_INCURSION_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Orb Slot[/gold] and [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Dark[/gold] Orb.
HILLO-MALICE_POWER.title: Malice
HILLO-MALICE_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card, apply to a random enemy (equal chance) 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], 1 [gold]Weak[/gold], or -1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
HILLO-MALICE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play a card, apply to a random enemy (equal chance) 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], 1 [gold]Weak[/gold], or -1 [gold]Strength[/gold], repeated [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times.
HILLO-GRAND_ENCORE_POWER.title: Grand Encore
HILLO-GRAND_ENCORE_POWER.description:
At the start of your turn, play 1 [gold]Dramatic Entrance[/gold].
At the end of your turn, play all [gold]Dramatic Entrances[/gold] in your exhaust pile.
HILLO-GRAND_ENCORE_POWER.smartDescriptio:
At the start of your turn, play 1 [gold]Dramatic Entrance[/gold].
At the end of your turn, play all [gold]Dramatic Entrances[/gold] in your exhaust pile.
HILLO-ENERGY_TO_STARS.title: Energy to Stars
HILLO-STARS_TO_ENERGY.title: Stars to Energy
HILLO-STAR_SWORD_POWER.title: Star Sword
HILLO-STAR_SWORD_POWER.description: #[gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold]'s cost is reduced by {Amount}[E] and it costs an additional {Amount}{singleStarIcon}.
HILLO-STAR_SWORD_POWER.smartDescription: #[gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold]'s cost is reduced by {Amount}[E] and it costs an additional {Amount}{singleStarIcon}.
HILLO-ALL_IN_POWER.title: All In
HILLO-MYRIAD_SWORDS_POWER.title: Myriad Swords
HILLO-MYRIAD_SWORDS_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, play all your [gold]Sovereign Blades[/gold], wherever they are.
HILLO-MYRIAD_SWORDS_POWER.smartDescripti: At the end of your turn, play all your [gold]Sovereign Blades[/gold], wherever they are.
HILLO-AGILE_POWER.title: Agile
HILLO-AGILE_POWER.description: Whenever you discard a card, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
HILLO-AGILE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you discard a card, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
HILLO-SLY_FORM_POWER.title: Sly Form
HILLO-SLY_FORM_POWER.description: After all your cards are discarded, they gain [gold]Sly[/gold].
HILLO-SLY_FORM_POWER.smartDescription: After all your cards are discarded, they gain [gold]Sly[/gold].
HILLO-WIND_WALK_POWER.title: Wind Walk
HILLO-WIND_WALK_POWER.description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
HILLO-WIND_WALK_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play an Attack, gain {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
HILLO-WIND_WALK_TEMPORARY_DEXTERITY_POWE: Gain {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] until the end of this turn.
Gain {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] until the end of this turn.
HILLO-ASSURANCE_POWER.title: Assurance
HILLO-ASSURANCE_POWER.description: Whenever you play a non-[gold]Sly[/gold] Power card, add a 3-cost copy of it to your discard pile; the copy gains [gold]Sly[/gold].
HILLO-ASSURANCE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play a non-[gold]Sly[/gold] Power card, add a 3-cost copy of it to your discard pile; the copy gains [gold]Sly[/gold].
HILLO-BINARY_POWER.title: Binary
HILLO-BINARY_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card with an odd Energy cost, draw {Amount} card(s).
HILLO-BINARY_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play a card with an odd Energy cost, draw {Amount} card(s).
HILLO-LIGHTNING_TIME_POWER.title: Lightning Time
HILLO-LIGHTNING_TIME_POWER.description: Whenever you Channel a Lightning Orb, Channel {Amount} more.
HILLO-LIGHTNING_TIME_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you Channel a Lightning Orb, Channel {Amount} more.
